why aethel

Strength, community & progression

✓

Science-based programming

Periodized cycles, strength benchmarks, and mobility drills.

🔥

Small class sizes (max 12)

Personal attention, form correction, and real progress.

🏆

No initiation fees

Month-to-month memberships, no hidden contracts.

inside aethel

Raw moments. Real strength.

membership

Plans that fit your rhythm

Cancel anytime · access to all group classes + open gym

Starter
$69/mo

4 classes / month + open gym

  • ✓ access to strength & cardio zones
  • ✓ community WODs
  • ✓ locker & towel service
popular
Core
$119/mo

unlimited classes + open gym

  • ✓ unlimited signature strength/HIIT
  • ✓ guest pass (2x/month)
  • ✓ 10% off proshop & cafe
Elite
$189/mo

unlimited + PT + recovery

  • ✓ 1 personal session per month
  • ✓ recovery zone (sauna/cryo)
  • ✓ priority class booking

training zones

Find your discipline

Specialized areas with world-class coaching and gear.

Strength Lab

Eleiko racks, calibrated plates, and deadlift platforms. Open 5am–11pm.

coaching: powerlifting & oly →

HIIT Yard

SkiErg, assault bikes, turf zone, sleds. Timed intervals with heart-rate monitoring.

classes every 45min →

Mobility & Recovery

Normatec boots, percussion guns, stretch zones, and guided active recovery.

included in Core+ →
